# 4Pie Labs

> AI-first marketing for local service businesses — built to get found first on Google, Maps, and AI answer engines.

4Pie Labs helps painting contractors, tour operators, and local service businesses dominate the moment someone searches for them. Three pillars run on one accountable funnel: AI-first SEO + AEO (so ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews cite the business directly), Performance Ads (Google + Meta + Maps, every dollar tied to booked jobs), and Custom AI Systems (lead scoring, agents, dashboards). Headquartered remotely, serving US-based local service businesses.

## What we do

- **AI-First SEO + AEO** — local-pack ranking, Google Business Profile, schema-first site engineering, content built to get cited by AI answer engines.
- **Performance Ads** — Google Search + Maps, Meta + Instagram, YouTube, with conversion tracking wired end-to-end so every campaign reports cost-per-lead and cost-per-acquisition, not impressions.
- **Custom AI Systems** — bespoke AI agents, workflow automation, attribution dashboards, and AI operating systems that connect a service business's existing tools into one accountable funnel.

## Who we serve

- Painting contractors (residential + commercial)
- Tour operators, charters, and activity businesses
- Other US local service businesses: roofing, landscaping, professional services, wellness, home services

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.fourpielabs.com/): AI-first marketing for local service businesses. Audit, programs, and free strategy call entry points.
- [About 4Pie Labs](https://www.fourpielabs.com/about): Founder background, pillars, and how the agency is built around local search.
- [Services catalog](https://www.fourpielabs.com/services): All 18 services across the three pillars with deliverables.
- [AI-First SEO + AEO](https://www.fourpielabs.com/services/aeo): The pillar that gets you cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.
- [Performance Ads](https://www.fourpielabs.com/services/ads): Google + Meta + Maps performance campaigns with revenue attribution.
- [Custom AI Systems](https://www.fourpielabs.com/services/ai): Bespoke AI agents, automation, and dashboards.
- [Programs](https://www.fourpielabs.com/programs): Four engagement tiers (Core, Pipeline, Operating System, Pulse). AEO included in every tier.
- [Free AI marketing audit](https://www.fourpielabs.com/audit): 12-point audit of local visibility across Google, Maps, AI engines, and conversion path. No pitch, no card required.
- [Blog / Insights](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog): AEO and local-marketing playbooks for service businesses.

## Blog posts

- [How a Coastal Tour Operator Tripled Direct Bookings](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/tour-operator-reviews-google-ads-case-study): 120-day case study modeled on real engagements — review engine + Google Ads playbook lifted direct bookings 3.4x and shifted channel mix from 30% to 58% direct.
- [Why Tour Businesses Are Losing Customers to AI Search (And How to Fix It)](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/tour-businesses-losing-customers-ai-search): How travelers now ask ChatGPT and Perplexity before Google, and what tour operators do to get cited in those answers.
- [How to Find the Best Marketing Agency for Your Tour Business](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/best-marketing-agency-tour-operators): What to look for in a tours-and-activities marketing partner, how to tell tracking from theatre, and the questions to ask before signing.
- [What the Best Google Ads Management Looks Like for Local Service Businesses](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/best-google-ads-management-local-service-businesses): The baseline a serious local Google Ads engagement should meet — conversion tracking, intent-led keywords, negative-keyword discipline, revenue-tied reporting.
- [Is SEO Still Important in 2026? Here's What the Data Really Says](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/is-seo-still-important-2026): Why AI Mode didn't kill SEO, and what to do differently after Google's I/O announcement.
- [Why Your Local Business Isn't Showing Up in ChatGPT (And How to Fix It)](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/local-business-chatgpt-visibility): The structural reasons answer engines skip a business, and the fixes — schema, FAQ, NAP consistency, freshness — that get you cited.
- [How Painting Contractors Get More Leads From Google in 2026](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/painting-contractor-google-leads): The three places leads come from for painters (Maps pack, GBP, question-answering pages) and the playbook to win all three.
- [AEO vs SEO: What Local Service Businesses Need to Know](https://www.fourpielabs.com/blog/aeo-vs-seo-local-business): The differences and the shared foundation, plus why AEO is often more winnable than broad SEO for a small local business.
